name: shikaku-master
description: Shikaku Master - Offline-first logic puzzle game (monorepo)
comment: Anchor React 18.3 at the workspace root (a hoist target, NOT an override) so the hoisted web toolchain (Next/styled-jsx) resolves a single React 18 matching react-dom. The mobile app (Expo 56 / React 19) declares its own React 19, which npm nests under apps/mobile.
